name: figma-ui-mcp
description: Bidirectional Figma MCP bridge — AI draws UI on Figma canvas and reads designs back. No API key needed.
author: TranHoaiHung

tools.name: figma_status
tools.description: Check whether the Figma plugin bridge is connected. Always call this first to confirm the plugin is running before any other tool.

tools.name: figma_write
tools.description: Execute JavaScript code to create or modify designs in Figma. Supports create, modify, delete, clone, group, ungroup, flatten, resize, batch operations. Design tokens: createVariableCollection, createVariable, setVariableValue, addVariableMode, renameVariableMode, removeVariableMode, applyVariable, setFrameVariableMode, clearFrameVariableMode, createPaintStyle, createTextStyle, createComponent. Code runs in a sandboxed VM.

code.description: JavaScript using figma.create(), figma.modify(), figma.setPage(), etc.

tools.name: figma_read
tools.description: Read design data from Figma — extract node trees, colors, typography, spacing, and screenshots. Operations: get_selection, get_design, get_page_nodes, screenshot, export_svg, get_styles, get_local_components, get_viewport, get_variables, get_node_detail, export_image, search_nodes, scan_design.

nodeId.description: Target node ID (optional — omit to use current selection).

depth.description: Tree depth for get_design/get_selection. Number (default 10) or 'full'.

includeHidden.description: Include invisible nodes in results. Default false.

tools.name: figma_docs
tools.description: Get the full API reference for figma_write — all operations, parameters, and code examples. Always call this before writing non-trivial draw code.
